title: PreToolUse guard pre-validates AskUserQuestion -> clear deny instead of opaque 'Invalid tool parameters'
action: Turn the harness's opaque 'Invalid tool parameters' (recurring when a gate/decision question violates the AskUserQuestion schema) into a clear, self-documenting deny. New guards.checkAskUserQuestion(toolInput): denies on header>12 chars (the #1 cause), <2 or >4 options/question, >4 questions, or an option missing label/description — with a message naming the exact violation; fail-open on any unrecognized shape. Wired into bee-write-guard.mjs (an AskUserQuestion branch) and the write-guard PreToolUse matcher (Edit|...|AskUserQuestion) across ALL sources: hooks/catalog.mjs (single source of truth, re-rendered hooks.json + claude-hooks.json), onboard_bee.mjs (both settings-gen paths), test_onboard_bee expected matcher. Test-first RED->GREEN at both lib (checkAskUserQuestion) and hook (test_write_guard) levels.

truths: checkAskUserQuestion denies header>12, option-count out of 2-4, >4 questions, missing label/description; fail-open on odd shapes.
The hook denies an invalid AskUserQuestion (exit 2) with a message naming the violation; allows a valid one.
The write-guard matcher includes AskUserQuestion consistently across catalog + both projections + onboard settings-gen + the test.
artifacts: Full 21-suite verify green (foreground); RED->GREEN at lib + hook level; catalog projections byte-identical.
key_links: claude-code-guide: PreToolUse fires before schema validation
prohibitions: Do NOT hard-deny on any shape not confidently invalid (fail-open).
Do NOT hand-edit the generated hooks.json/claude-hooks.json — render from catalog.mjs.

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs

trace.outcome: PreToolUse guard turns opaque 'Invalid tool parameters' on AskUserQuestion into a clear, specific deny naming the schema violation (header>12 etc.); fail-open
trace.verification_evidence:
Before: a gate/decision/confirm question whose AskUserQuestion params violated the tool schema (most often header > 12 chars — descriptive VN/EN headers overflow instantly) was rejected by the harness with the opaque "Invalid tool parameters" — naming neither the tool nor the bad field. Recurring, hard to debug from a screenshot. RED: checkAskUserQuestion didn't exist; the write-guard did not fire on AskUserQuestion.
After: PreToolUse (bee-write-guard, matcher now includes AskUserQuestion) pre-validates via guards.checkAskUserQuestion and denies with a clear message ("header 'X' is 14 chars (>12) — shorten it"), so the agent fixes it and a screenshot shows the real cause. Fail-open on any shape not confidently invalid.
Evidence: test_lib 340/0 (RED->GREEN unit: valid allowed; header>12/<2 or >4 options/>4 questions/missing label/description all deny; {}/null/non-array questions fail-open); test_write_guard 3 new hook checks pass (14-char header -> exit 2 + message names it; valid -> exit 0); test_hook_contracts 0 failing (catalog.mjs is the single source of truth, hooks.json + claude-hooks.json RE-RENDERED, byte-identical, only ALLOWED_DIFFERENCES separate the two projections); matcher made consistent across catalog + both projections + onboard_bee 2 settings-gen paths + test_onboard_bee expected. Full 21-suite foreground CHAIN_EXIT:0; mirrors byte-identical. Gotcha recorded: hooks.json/claude-hooks.json are GENERATED from hooks/catalog.mjs (renderProjectionText) — never hand-edit; and catalog.mjs is NOT vendored to .bee/bin/hooks (source-only).
trace.verify_output: test_lib 340/0 (checkAskUserQuestion: valid allowed; header>12/option-count/question-count/missing-label/description denied; fail-open on odd shapes); test_write_guard ALL PASS incl 3 AskUserQuestion hook checks (14-char header denied exit 2 + message names it, valid allowed exit 0); test_hook_contracts 0 failing (catalog projections byte-identical after re-render); test_onboard_bee green (matcher assertion updated); test_lib_mirror green. Full 21-suite foreground CHAIN_EXIT:0.
trace.verify_command: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs
